Very good service station, with a park, tables for eating outdoors, all the facilities are well maintained.

reviews.comment:
Todo bien, pero me parece insólito que en una YPF no se pueda pagar con la app de YPF, no entendí, por más que los puntos se puedan sumar con el DNI, deberían agiornar la modalidad de pago.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine, but I find it unusual that you can't pay with the YPF app at a YPF station. I don't understand. Even though you can accumulate points with your ID, they should update the payment method.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2dzdHcEdREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala la atención en la tienda YPF Full, no me quisieron cobrar con la aplicación, y en esta me habían enviado promociones de descuento que no pude aprovechar. El  cajero de la tienda, un hombre alto y joven,  no está a la altura que estés servicio en general ofrece, y los clientes merecen. Una lástima porque la atención en la carga de combustible fue muy buena !!, por ello quiero marcar las diferencias.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the YPF Full station was terrible. They refused to process my payment through the app, even though they had sent me promotional discounts that I couldn't use. The cashier, a tall, young man, was not up to the standard that this service generally offers, and that customers deserve. It's a shame because the service while I was filling up was excellent! That's why I want to highlight the differences.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2dmVxcDNRRRAB
